title: SBI Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: SBI Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!
